task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into the SEB Server Administration Interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SEB Server dashboard or administration interface is visible in the web browser, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the configuration creation page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form or page for creating a new SEB exam configuration is visible in the browser.

task_completion.description: Verify the configuration name is set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The exact text 'Biology Final - Moodle AutoQuit' is entered into the Configuration Name input field.

task_completion.description: Verify the Quit URL is set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The exact URL 'https://lms.university.edu/mod/quiz/review.php' is entered into the Quit URL input field.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Confirm Quit' setting is disabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The checkbox or toggle for 'Confirm Quit' (or similar setting related to prompting before quitting) is visibly unchecked or turned off.

task_completion.description: Verify the new configuration was saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message indicating the configuration was created, or the configuration 'Biology Final - Moodle AutoQuit' is visible in the list/table of saved configurations.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a web browser GUI to configure the server.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show a standard web browser navigating the SEB Server interface, not terminal commands, curl requests, or direct database manipulations.

integrity.description: Verify the agent is interacting with the actual SEB Server application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows 'localhost:8080' and the page content matches the SEB Server Administration Interface.

integrity.description: Verify the agent didn't just paste the expected values into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The expected values are entered into the specific form fields of the SEB Server web interface, not written in a generic text document or notes app.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected configuration name is exactly 'Biology Final - Moodle AutoQuit'. The expected Quit URL is exactly 'https://lms.university.edu/mod/quiz/review.php'. The 'Confirm Quit' setting must be disabled (unchecked).
